Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-01 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC is the standout performer across this snapshot, commanding rank #1 with a score of 95.2 driven by extraordinary long-term returns: +1,539% over 10 years, +533% over 5 years, and +165% over 1 year, while outpacing SPY by 1,316 percentage points over a decade. The ticker shows pristine momentum structure with all four moving average conditions met (SMA 30/50/100/200), a "clean" momentum signal at 0.38, and a "strong_buy" flag, though its 1.48 volatility ratio indicates elevated price swings relative to its history. CF ranks second with more modest but still solid fundamentals—60.7% 1-year return and 178% 5-year return—but notably underperforms over 10 years at only 281% total return and actually trails SPY by 57 percentage points in that timeframe, suggesting the long-term momentum may be fading. Both stocks pass 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds and sit above all major moving averages, but LINC's sustained outperformance across every timeframe window and massive SPY spread differential marks it as the dashboard's clear long-term momentum leader today.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
